---
title: "ANCOVA analysis"
author: "Elizabeth Campbell"
date: "2025-12-07"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

`
```{r}
#===============================================================================
# Genotype × Population Interaction Analysis (ANCOVA)
# Testing for Population-Specific vs. Parallel Climate Adaptation
#
# Author: Elizabeth Campbell
# Affiliation: Department of Tropical Plant and Soil Sciences,
#              University of Hawaii at Manoa
# Date: December 2025
#
# Description: Tests whether climate-associated SNPs show consistent effects
#              across populations (parallel adaptation) or population-specific
#              effects (divergent adaptation) using ANCOVA with genotype × 
#              population interaction terms. Uses FDR correction (q < 0.05).
#
# Key Finding: 75.8% of candidate SNPs show parallel adaptation (universal
#              effects), while 24.2% show population-specific effects.
#
# References:
#   - Benjamini & Hochberg (1995) FDR correction
#   - Type II ANOVA for unbalanced designs (Fox & Weisberg 2019)
#===============================================================================

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(car)      # For Type II ANOVA
library(ggplot2)

#===============================================================================
# SETUP
#===============================================================================

# File paths
BASE_DIR <- "C:/Users/Lizzy/OneDrive/Documents/UH_Manoa_Classes/IWG_Chapter_2"
GWAS_DIR <- file.path(BASE_DIR, "Analysis_Outputs_and_Visualizations/GWAS")
DATA_DIR <- file.path(BASE_DIR, "Processed_Data")
PHENO_DIR <- file.path(BASE_DIR, "Phenotype_and_Ecographic_Data")
OUTPUT_DIR <- file.path(BASE_DIR, "Analysis_Outputs_and_Visualizations/ANCOVA")

dir.create(OUTPUT_DIR, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Significance threshold
SUGGESTIVE_THRESHOLD <- 5e-5  # Candidate SNPs from GWAS

cat("================================================================================\n")
cat("ANCOVA ANALYSIS - Population-Specific Climate Adaptation\n")
cat("================================================================================\n\n")

#===============================================================================
# STEP 1: Extract Candidate SNP-Climate Combinations from GWAS
#===============================================================================

cat("Step 1: Extracting Q+K model significant combinations (p < 5e-5)...\n")

gwas_files <- list.files(GWAS_DIR, pattern = "gwas_four_models_bio.*\\.csv", 
                         full.names = TRUE)

if (length(gwas_files) == 0) {
  stop("ERROR: No GWAS files found. Check GWAS_DIR path.")
}

cat("  Found", length(gwas_files), "GWAS files\n")

# Extract Q+K model significant combinations
qk_significant <- data.frame()

for (file in gwas_files) {
  bio_num <- gsub(".*bio(\\d+)\\.csv", "\\1", basename(file))
  bio_var <- paste0("wc2.1_30s_bio_", bio_num)
  
  gwas_data <- read.csv(file)
  
  qk_sig <- gwas_data %>%
    filter(model == "Q+K" & p_value < SUGGESTIVE_THRESHOLD) %>%
    select(marker, p_value) %>%
    mutate(bio_var = bio_var)
  
  qk_significant <- rbind(qk_significant, qk_sig)
}

qk_significant <- qk_significant %>% distinct(marker, bio_var, .keep_all = TRUE)

cat(sprintf("  Found %d SNP-climate combinations\n", nrow(qk_significant)))
cat(sprintf("  Unique SNPs: %d\n", length(unique(qk_significant$marker))))
cat(sprintf("  Unique climate variables: %d\n\n", length(unique(qk_significant$bio_var))))

#===============================================================================
# STEP 2: Load Data
#===============================================================================

cat("Step 2: Loading genotype, phenotype, and population data...\n")

# Genotype (tab-separated, skip first row)
genotype <- read.table(file.path(DATA_DIR, "IWG_numeric_genotype.txt"), 
                       sep = "\t", header = TRUE, skip = 1, 
                       check.names = FALSE, na.strings = c("NA", "N"))
colnames(genotype)[1] <- "taxa"

# Phenotype (tab-separated, skip first 2 rows)
phenotype <- read.table(file.path(PHENO_DIR, "IWG_PI_Phenotype (1).txt"), 
                        sep = "\t", header = TRUE, skip = 2, check.names = FALSE)
colnames(phenotype)[1] <- "taxa"

# Population clusters
pca_clusters <- read.csv(file.path(PHENO_DIR, "IWG_pca_clusters_k6.csv"))
colnames(pca_clusters)[1] <- "taxa"

cat(sprintf("  Genotype: %d samples x %d SNPs\n", nrow(genotype), ncol(genotype)-1))
cat(sprintf("  Phenotype: %d samples x %d variables\n", nrow(phenotype), ncol(phenotype)-3))
cat(sprintf("  Populations: %d samples\n\n", nrow(pca_clusters)))

#===============================================================================
# STEP 3: Prepare Dataset
#===============================================================================

cat("Step 3: Merging data...\n")

# Climate variable metadata
bio_info <- data.frame(
  bio_var = paste0("wc2.1_30s_bio_", 1:19),
  bio_name = c("Annual Mean Temp", "Mean Diurnal Range", "Isothermality", 
               "Temp Seasonality", "Max Temp Warmest Month", "Min Temp Coldest Month",
               "Temp Annual Range", "Mean Temp Wettest Quarter", "Mean Temp Driest Quarter",
               "Mean Temp Warmest Quarter", "Mean Temp Coldest Quarter", "Annual Precip",
               "Precip Wettest Month", "Precip Driest Month", "Precip Seasonality",
               "Precip Wettest Quarter", "Precip Driest Quarter", "Precip Warmest Quarter",
               "Precip Coldest Quarter"),
  category = c(rep("Temperature", 11), rep("Precipitation", 8))
)

# Merge datasets
individual_data <- genotype %>%
  left_join(phenotype, by = "taxa") %>%
  left_join(pca_clusters, by = "taxa") %>%
  mutate(Cluster = factor(Cluster))

cat(sprintf("  Combined: %d individuals, %d populations\n\n", 
            nrow(individual_data), 
            length(levels(individual_data$Cluster))))

#===============================================================================
# STEP 4: ANCOVA Function
#===============================================================================

run_ancova <- function(data, snp, bio_var) {
  
  test_data <- data %>%
    select(taxa, Cluster, all_of(snp), all_of(bio_var)) %>%
    rename(genotype = !!snp, climate = !!bio_var) %>%
    filter(!is.na(genotype) & !is.na(climate)) %>%
    mutate(genotype = factor(genotype), Cluster = factor(Cluster))
  
  # Need sufficient data
  if (length(unique(test_data$Cluster)) < 2 || 
      length(unique(test_data$genotype)) < 2 || 
      nrow(test_data) < 10) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # ANCOVA: climate ~ Population + Genotype + Population×Genotype
  tryCatch({
    model <- lm(climate ~ Cluster + genotype + Cluster:genotype, data = test_data)
    anova_result <- Anova(model, type = "II")
    
    data.frame(
      marker = snp,
      bio_var = bio_var,
      n = nrow(test_data),
      n_populations = length(unique(test_data$Cluster)),
      n_genotypes = length(unique(test_data$genotype)),
      population_F = anova_result["Cluster", "F value"],
      population_p = anova_result["Cluster", "Pr(>F)"],
      genotype_F = anova_result["genotype", "F value"],
      genotype_p = anova_result["genotype", "Pr(>F)"],
      interaction_F = anova_result["Cluster:genotype", "F value"],
      interaction_p = anova_result["Cluster:genotype", "Pr(>F)"],
      model_r2 = summary(model)$r.squared,
      adj_r2 = summary(model)$adj.r.squared
    )
  }, error = function(e) NULL)
}

#===============================================================================
# STEP 5: Run ANCOVA for All Combinations
#===============================================================================

cat("Step 4: Running ANCOVA tests...\n")

ancova_results <- list()

for (i in 1:nrow(qk_significant)) {
  result <- run_ancova(individual_data, 
                       qk_significant$marker[i], 
                       qk_significant$bio_var[i])
  if (!is.null(result)) {
    ancova_results[[length(ancova_results) + 1]] <- result
  }
  
  if (i %% 10 == 0) cat("  Completed", i, "tests\n")
}

ancova_df <- bind_rows(ancova_results)
cat(sprintf("\n  Completed %d ANCOVA tests\n\n", nrow(ancova_df)))

#===============================================================================
# STEP 6: FDR Correction
#===============================================================================

cat("Step 5: Applying FDR correction...\n")

ancova_df <- ancova_df %>%
  mutate(
    population_q = p.adjust(population_p, method = "fdr"),
    genotype_q = p.adjust(genotype_p, method = "fdr"),
    interaction_q = p.adjust(interaction_p, method = "fdr"),
    significant_population = population_q < 0.05,
    significant_genotype = genotype_q < 0.05,
    significant_interaction = interaction_q < 0.05
  ) %>%
  left_join(bio_info, by = "bio_var")

#===============================================================================
# STEP 7: Summary Statistics
#===============================================================================

cat("\n================================================================================\n")
cat("RESULTS SUMMARY (FDR q < 0.05)\n")
cat("================================================================================\n\n")

cat("Overall:\n")
cat(sprintf("  Total tests: %d\n", nrow(ancova_df)))
cat(sprintf("  Significant population effects: %d (%.1f%%)\n",
            sum(ancova_df$significant_population),
            100 * mean(ancova_df$significant_population)))
cat(sprintf("  Significant genotype effects: %d (%.1f%%)\n",
            sum(ancova_df$significant_genotype),
            100 * mean(ancova_df$significant_genotype)))
cat(sprintf("  Significant G×P interactions: %d (%.1f%%)\n\n",
            sum(ancova_df$significant_interaction),
            100 * mean(ancova_df$significant_interaction)))

# By category
cat("By climate category:\n")
by_category <- ancova_df %>%
  group_by(category) %>%
  summarize(
    n_tests = n(),
    n_sig_interactions = sum(significant_interaction),
    pct_sig = 100 * n_sig_interactions / n_tests,
    .groups = "drop"
  )
print(by_category)

# Parallel vs divergent
cat("\n")
cat("Adaptation pattern:\n")
cat(sprintf("  Parallel (no G×P interaction): %.1f%%\n",
            100 * (1 - mean(ancova_df$significant_interaction))))
cat(sprintf("  Divergent (significant G×P interaction): %.1f%%\n\n",
            100 * mean(ancova_df$significant_interaction)))

#===============================================================================
# STEP 8: Save Results
#===============================================================================

cat("Saving results...\n")

write.csv(ancova_df, 
          file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "ancova_full_results.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

sig_interactions <- ancova_df %>%
  filter(significant_interaction) %>%
  arrange(interaction_q)

write.csv(sig_interactions, 
          file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "ancova_significant_interactions.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

cat(sprintf("  Saved full results (%d tests)\n", nrow(ancova_df)))
cat(sprintf("  Saved significant interactions (%d)\n\n", nrow(sig_interactions)))

# Top interactions
if (nrow(sig_interactions) > 0) {
  cat("Top 10 significant interactions:\n")
  print(sig_interactions %>%
          head(10) %>%
          select(marker, bio_name, interaction_F, interaction_q, adj_r2))
}

#===============================================================================
# STEP 9: Visualizations
#===============================================================================

cat("\nCreating visualizations...\n")

# Significant effects
sig_counts <- data.frame(
  Effect = c("Population", "Genotype", "G×P Interaction"),
  Count = c(sum(ancova_df$significant_population),
            sum(ancova_df$significant_genotype),
            sum(ancova_df$significant_interaction))
)

p1 <- ggplot(sig_counts, aes(x = Effect, y = Count, fill = Effect)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_text(aes(label = Count), vjust = -0.5, size = 5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#d32f2f", "#1976d2", "#757575")) +
  labs(title = "Significant ANCOVA Effects (FDR < 0.05)",
       y = "Number of Tests") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none", text = element_text(size = 12))

ggsave(file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "ancova_effects.png"), p1, 
       width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# Interaction strength by category
p2 <- ggplot(ancova_df, aes(x = category, y = interaction_F, fill = category)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#ef5350", "#42a5f5")) +
  labs(title = "G×P Interaction Strength by Climate Type",
       x = "Climate Category", y = "Interaction F-statistic") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none", text = element_text(size = 12))

ggsave(file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "ancova_interaction_by_category.png"), p2, 
       width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)

cat("  Saved visualizations\n")

#===============================================================================
# COMPLETE
#===============================================================================

cat("\n================================================================================\n")
cat("ANALYSIS COMPLETE\n")
cat("================================================================================\n\n")
cat("Results saved to:", OUTPUT_DIR, "\n")
cat(sprintf("\nKey finding: %.1f%% parallel adaptation, %.1f%% divergent\n\n",
            100 * (1 - mean(ancova_df$significant_interaction)),
            100 * mean(ancova_df$significant_interaction)))

#===============================================================================
# END
#===============================================================================
```
